params.prompt: Photorealistic interior photograph of a medium Relax, outdoor/covered patio area with wide openings to living/dining windows, Use bright natural daylight; treat patio as extension of living/dining light. A calm, warm Japandi-driven aesthetic balancing Scandinavian simplicity and Japanese restraint. The palette is warm neutrals with layered natural materials (oak, rattan, linen, stone) and soft, directional sunlight. Spaces are decluttered, low-profile, and arranged to support a young family: a modest crib in the bedroom and a compact standing desk integrated into the living corner for flexible work-from-home needs. Textures and lighting create a meditative, lived-in atmosphere rather than a staged showhome. Use bright natural daylight; treat patio as extension of living/dining light.
